name: Merino Wool V-Neck Sweater
description: Fine-gauge merino wool sweater with a classic v-neck. Temperature-regulating, naturally odor-resistant, and incredibly soft against the skin. An essential layering piece that transitions from work to weekend.
specs: 100% extra-fine merino wool (19.5 micron), 12-gauge fine knit, Fully fashioned seams, Rib-knit cuffs, hem, and v-neck, Temperature-regulating (warm in winter, cool in spring), Naturally odor-resistant and wrinkle-resistant, Hand wash cold or machine wash on wool cycle, Lay flat to dry, Sizes XS through 2XL
warranty: 45-day return window. Merino wool requires proper care — we include care instructions with every sweater. Free exchanges for size swaps.
shipping: Free standard shipping on all orders over $50. Standard delivery 3-5 business days. Express 1-2 day shipping available for $9.99.
